case_title: ISSA FIAD VS. FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIAD, ISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION CARDSERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC. $3,041.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,195.50, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES $2306.00 - BEING HELD IN RESERVE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE AND ENCLOSURES PROVIDED TO THE COURT FROM DEFT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORP. TO PLAINTIFF ISSA FIAD, FILED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FIAD, ISSA AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES CORPORATION CARDSERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE OF HEARING IS "DENIED". THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE APR-22-2008 @ 10:00 AM. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING.
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF ISSA FIAD. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". BY ITS TERMS, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES THE FUNDS HELD IN RESERVE, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARDSERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (LATE FILINGS) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARDSERVICE INTERNATIONAL, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
